message:
build: add flate2 and zstd compression dependencies

New compression dependencies for the .ftreplay chunked archive format:
- flate2 1.1.0 (workspace): gzip compression/decompression for replay
  artifact storage — used by the replay fixture harvest pipeline for
  compressing individual timeline chunks before writing to disk
- zstd (workspace, frankenterm-core): zstd compression for high-ratio
  replay archive storage

These enable the replay fixture harvest pipeline to produce compressed
.ftreplay archives with per-chunk compression, significantly reducing
disk footprint for large incident captures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -360,6 +360,7 @@ notify = "5.0.0"
 
 # File locking
 fs2 = "0.4.3"
+flate2 = "1.1.0"
 
 # TUI (optional)
 ratatui = "0.30.0"

@@ -48,6 +48,8 @@ chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock"
 
 # File locking
 fs2.workspace = true
+flate2.workspace = true
+zstd.workspace = true
 
 base64 = "0.22.1"
 crossbeam.workspace = true
